titleStmt.title: SII 23.459: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 459. (A.R. No. 459 of 1907.) Periyakōṭṭai, Palani Taluk, Madurai District Chōḷēśvara temple—on the rock north of the shrine Jaṭ. Sundara-Pāṇḍya: year 4

summary.p: This records a gift of 12 paṇam deposited with the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple of Ariyapirāṭṭīchchuramuḍaiyār, for offerings to the god on the day of Tīruvādirai in Mārgaḻi month and for taking out the deity in procession, by one Nallamaṅgaibāgaṉ Piṟaiśūḍum perumāṉ, a veḷḷāḻa of Tiruppākkiyam (village ?) in Aṇḍa-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakra
vattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevarkku yā
ṇṭu 4vatu Aṇṭa nāṭṭil tiruppākki
yattu veḷḷāḻaril nallamaṅkaipākaṉ
piṟaicūṭum perumāṉeṉ Uṭaiyār Ariya
pirāṭṭiccuramuṭaiyāṟku mārkaḻittiruvā
tiraikku Ikkoyilil kāṇi Uṭaiya ci
vapprāmaṇaril Aḻakaṉ piccaṉāṉa caivarā
titapaṇṭitaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum mutali cuṟṟaṅka
ttāṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum Avanāciyāṉa virapatti
rapaṭṭanum Ivarkaḷ Eṉ pakkal vāṅkiṉa pa
ṇam 10 2 Itukku Aḷakkum nel kalane tūṇi
Itukkuc cilavu Amutukku nel mukkuṟuṇi pūcai
kku nel mukkuṟuṇi tiruppaṇṇiyārattu
kkum neykkum karuppukkaṭṭikku
m nel Eḻukuṟuṇi tirumuṟaimār
Oru nāḷ nāyaṉār Eḻuntaruḷavum tirume
ṟpūccukkum nel śa Itu koṇṭu
cantrātittavarai kuṭaṅkoṇṭu
koyil pukuvān celuttuvāṉ .
Digital edition of SII 23.459 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
